name: News Header
description: News magazine header with breaking bar
html:
BREAKING{{breakingText}}
{{logo}}
    {{#each navLinks}}
  • {{label}}
    • {{/each}}
{{ctaText}}
css: .breaking-bar { background: #b91c1c; color: #fff; padding: 0.5rem 0; font-size: 0.875rem; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .breaking-label { font-weight: 700; margin-right: 0.5rem; } .header { padding: 1rem 0; background: #fff; border-bottom: 3px solid #111827; } .header-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .logo a { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 900; color: #111827; text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .nav-links { display: flex; list-style: none; gap: 1.5rem; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .nav-links a { color: #374151; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; transition: color 0.2s; } .nav-links a:hover { color: #b91c1c; } .header-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; } .btn-primary { background: #b91c1c; color: #fff; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; text-transform: uppercase; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .nav { display: none; } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .logo a { font-size: 1.5rem; } }

breakingText.default: Tech industry sees major shifts in AI regulation — Full story inside

name: News Hero
html:
{{mainStory.title}}
{{mainStory.category}}

{{mainStory.title}}

{{mainStory.excerpt}}

{{#each sideStories}}{{category}}

{{title}}

{{/each}}
css: .hero { padding: 2rem 0; background: #fff; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .hero-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr; gap: 1.5rem; } .hero-story { text-decoration: none; color: inherit; display: block; } .hero-image { aspect-ratio: 16/9; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .hero-placeholder { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); } .story-category { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #b91c1c; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .hero-story-title { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #111827; line-height: 1.2; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .hero-story-excerpt { color: #6b7280; line-height: 1.6; } .hero-side { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; } .side-story { text-decoration: none; color: inherit; padding: 1rem; border-left: 3px solid #e5e7eb; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .side-story:hover { border-color: #b91c1c; } .side-story-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; line-height: 1.3; margin-top: 0.5rem; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .hero-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .hero-side { flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap; } .side-story { flex: 1; min-width: 200px; } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .hero-story-title { font-size: 1.5rem; } } @media (max-width: 320px) { .hero-story-title { font-size: 1.25rem; } }

default.title: Global Summit Reaches Historic Agreement on Climate Action
default.excerpt: World leaders have agreed to unprecedented measures to reduce carbon emissions by 2030, marking a turning point in international climate policy.

default.title: Tech Giants Report Record Quarterly Earnings
New Study Reveals Benefits of Remote Work

name: News Sections
description: News category sections with article grids
html:
{{#each sections}}

{{title}}

View all →
{{#each articles}}

{{title}}

{{excerpt}}

{{date}}
{{/each}}
{{/each}}
css: .news-sections { padding: 3rem 0; background: #fff; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .news-category { margin-bottom: 3rem; padding-bottom: 3rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb; } .category-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } .category-title { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #111827; border-left: 4px solid #b91c1c; padding-left: 0.75rem; } .category-more { color: #b91c1c; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; } .category-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; } .article-link { text-decoration: none; color: inherit; display: block; } .article-image { aspect-ratio: 16/9; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .article-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; line-height: 1.3; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .article-excerpt { color: #6b7280; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .article-meta { font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .category-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .category-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

articles.title: AI Regulation Framework Takes Shape in Europe
articles.excerpt: The European Union has unveiled comprehensive guidelines for AI development and deployment.

articles.title: Quantum Computing Breakthrough Announced
articles.excerpt: Researchers achieve new milestone in quantum error correction.

articles.title: The Rise of Edge Computing in 2026
articles.excerpt: How edge computing is transforming real-time data processing.

articles.title: Startup Funding Rebounds After Two-Year Slump
articles.excerpt: Venture capital investments show signs of recovery in Q1.

articles.title: Remote Work Policies Reshape Commercial Real Estate
articles.excerpt: Office vacancy rates hit record highs as companies adapt.

articles.title: Supply Chain Innovations Reduce Delivery Times
articles.excerpt: New logistics tech promises same-day delivery nationwide.

name: News Newsletter
html:
{{title}}

{{description}}

{{#each fields}}{{/each}}
css: .newsletter { padding: 3rem 0; background: #f3f4f6; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .newsletter-card { background: #111827; padding: 2.5rem; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 2rem; } .newsletter-title { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .newsletter-desc { color: #9ca3af; } .newsletter-form { display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; flex-shrink: 0; } .form-input { padding: 0.75rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #374151; background: #1f2937; color: #fff; border-radius: 0; font-size: 1rem; width: 250px; } .form-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #b91c1c; } .btn-primary { background: #b91c1c; color: #fff; padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem; border: none; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.875rem; white-space: nowrap; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .newsletter-card { flex-direction: column; text-align: center; } .newsletter-form { width: 100%; flex-direction: column; } .form-input { width: 100%; } }

description.default: Get the most important stories delivered to your inbox every morning.

name: News Opinion Section
html:
{{title}}

{{#each opinions}}
{{initials}}
{{name}}{{role}}

{{title}}

{{excerpt}}

Read more →
{{/each}}
css: .opinion { padding: 3rem 0; background: #fff; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .section-header { margin-bottom: 2rem; } .section-title { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #111827; border-left: 4px solid #b91c1c; padding-left: 0.75rem; } .opinion-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; } .opinion-card { padding: 1.5rem; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; } .opinion-author { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .author-avatar { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #fff; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.875rem; } .author-name { color: #111827; display: block; font-size: 0.875rem; } .author-role { color: #6b7280; font-size: 0.75rem; } .opinion-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; line-height: 1.3; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .opinion-excerpt { color: #6b7280; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .opinion-link { color: #b91c1c; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .opinion-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .opinion-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

default.name: Sarah Mitchell
default.title: Why AI Regulation Can't Wait
default.excerpt: The pace of AI development has outstripped our regulatory frameworks. Here's what needs to change.

default.name: James Park
default.title: The Hidden Cost of Free Social Media
default.excerpt: We've been paying for 'free' platforms with our data and attention. It's time for a reckoning.

default.name: Maria Santos
default.title: The Future of Work Is Already Here
default.excerpt: Remote work isn't a trend — it's a fundamental shift in how we think about employment.

html:
{{title}}

{{#each fields}}

css: .contact-form { padding: 3rem 0; background: #f3f4f6; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .form-wrapper { max-width: 500px; margin: 0 auto; } .form-title { font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 800; color: #111827; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } .form-group { margin-bottom: 1.25rem; } .form-label { display: block; font-weight: 600; color: #374151; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .form-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 0; font-size: 1rem; } .form-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #b91c1c; } textarea.form-input { min-height: 120px; resize: vertical; } .btn-block { width: 100%; text-align: center; border: none; cursor: pointer; } .btn-primary { background: #b91c1c; color: #fff; padding: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.875rem; }

css: .footer { padding: 3rem 0 2rem; background: #111827; color: #9ca3af; } .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .footer-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 3rem; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .footer-logo { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 900; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 1rem; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .footer-desc { line-height: 1.6; } .footer-col-title { color: #fff; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .footer-links { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; } .footer-links li { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .footer-links a { color: #9ca3af; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .footer-links a:hover { color: #fff; } .footer-bottom { border-top: 1px solid #374151; padding-top: 2rem; text-align: center; } .copyright { font-size: 0.875rem; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

description.default: Independent journalism that matters. Reporting the stories that shape our world.

copyright.default: © 2026 The Daily Pulse. All rights reserved.
